Internal operations

LoomaPOS Admin Console

Internal operations console for support, billing, reseller oversight, release control and observability.

OverviewAnalyticsTenantsSubscriptionsLicensesDevicesPaymentsInvoicesResellersSupportSyncQueuesDead LetterIntegrationsDeploymentsBackupsIncidentsRunbooksSLOsReleasesFeature FlagsCouponsCampaignsNoticesSecurityAuditSettings

Internal admin

Sensitive actions require role checks, reason entry and audit logging. This surface never runs store POS workflows.

Admin sign in

Phase 7-10 hardening

Internal admin access

Internal admin access now uses backend-issued sessions. Bootstrap credentials come from secure environment configuration.
